items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement for a different return location (one-way rental), but there is no concrete evidence provided that confirms this requirement has been satisfied. The linked use case mentions the need for a different return location, yet the evidence does not include any API reads or persisted state checks that demonstrate this functionality. Therefore, the validation step is inconclusive due to a lack of sufficient evidence.
